languages.text: "Фиксирую нарушение четвертой... Пятой степени? Торговый Патент был возвращен с серьезной погрешностью в координатах." {n}В голосе Паскаля звучит неодобрение, но неясно — к случившемуся с Патентом или к неточным расчетам при телепортации.{/n}

"Registering a transgression of the fourth... fifth degree? The Warrant of Trade was returned with a serious error in its coordinates." {n}There is disapproval in Pasqal's voice, but it is unclear whether it is due to what happened to the Warrant or the inaccurate calculations for teleportation.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Фиксирую нарушение четвертой... Пятой степени? Торговый Патент был возвращен с серьезной погрешностью в координатах." {n}В голосе Паскаля звучит неодобрение, но неясно — к случившемуся с Патентом или к неточным расчетам при телепортации.{/n}

The Warrant of Trade was returned with a serious error in its coordinates." {n}There is disapproval in Pasqal's voice, but it is unclear whether it is due to what happened to the Warrant or the inaccurate calculations for teleportation.{/n}

languages.text: 「第4、第5の違反を登録した…貿易証は、座標に重大な誤りがあり返却された」{n}パスカルの声には不満が感じられるが、貿易証の件なのか、テレポーテーションの計算が間違っていたのかは不明である。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Registering a transgression of the fourth... fifth degree? The Warrant of Trade was returned with a serious error in its coordinates." {n}There is disapproval in Pasqal's voice, but it is unclear whether it is due to what happened to the Warrant or the inaccurate calculations for teleportation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「第4、第5の違反を登録した…貿易証は、座標に重大な誤りがあり返却された」{n}パスカルの声には不満が感じられるが、貿易証の件なのか、テレポーテーションの計算が間違っていたのかは不明である。{/n}

languages.text: «Registrando una transgresión de cuarto grado... ¿o quinto? La Patente de Comercio ha sido devuelta con un error grave en las coordenadas». {n}No tienes muy claro si el tono de reproche de Pasqal está dirigido a lo sucedido con la Patente o a la escasa precisión del cálculo del teletransporte.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Registering a transgression of the fourth... fifth degree? The Warrant of Trade was returned with a serious error in its coordinates." {n}There is disapproval in Pasqal's voice, but it is unclear whether it is due to what happened to the Warrant or the inaccurate calculations for teleportation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Registrando una transgresión de cuarto grado... ¿o quinto? La Patente de Comercio ha sido devuelta con un error grave en las coordenadas». {n}No tienes muy claro si el tono de reproche de Pasqal está dirigido a lo sucedido con la Patente o a la escasa precisión del cálculo del teletransporte.{/n}

languages.text: "Registriere eine Verfehlung des vierten ... fünften Grades? Der Handelsbrief wurde mit einem drastischen Fehler hinsichtlich seiner Koordinaten zurückgebracht." {n}Pasquals Stimme hat einen missbilligenden Unterton ... wegen des Schicksals des Handelsbriefs oder der fehlerhaften Berechnungen für seine Teleportation.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Registering a transgression of the fourth... fifth degree? The Warrant of Trade was returned with a serious error in its coordinates." {n}There is disapproval in Pasqal's voice, but it is unclear whether it is due to what happened to the Warrant or the inaccurate calculations for teleportation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Registriere eine Verfehlung des vierten ... fünften Grades? Der Handelsbrief wurde mit einem drastischen Fehler hinsichtlich seiner Koordinaten zurückgebracht." {n}Pasquals Stimme hat einen missbilligenden Unterton ... wegen des Schicksals des Handelsbriefs oder der fehlerhaften Berechnungen für seine Teleportation.{/n}

languages.text: « Détection d'une transgression de quatrième... ou cinquième degré ? La lettre de marque nous a été rendue, mais avec des coordonnées incorrectes. » {n}Vous percevez une profonde désapprobation dans la voix de Pasqal, mais il vous est impossible de savoir si elle résulte du sort réservé à la lettre ou de l'erreur de calcul lors de la téléportation.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Registering a transgression of the fourth... fifth degree? The Warrant of Trade was returned with a serious error in its coordinates." {n}There is disapproval in Pasqal's voice, but it is unclear whether it is due to what happened to the Warrant or the inaccurate calculations for teleportation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Détection d'une transgression de quatrième... ou cinquième degré ? La lettre de marque nous a été rendue, mais avec des coordonnées incorrectes. » {n}Vous percevez une profonde désapprobation dans la voix de Pasqal, mais il vous est impossible de savoir si elle résulte du sort réservé à la lettre ou de l'erreur de calcul lors de la téléportation.{/n}

languages.text: “正在登记违规行为，违规等级第四级……或者第五级？在回收贸易授状时，其坐标存在严重误差。”{n}帕斯卡语带不满，但不确定是针对授状的遭遇，还是针对传送坐标计算的失准。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Registering a transgression of the fourth... fifth degree? The Warrant of Trade was returned with a serious error in its coordinates." {n}There is disapproval in Pasqal's voice, but it is unclear whether it is due to what happened to the Warrant or the inaccurate calculations for teleportation.{/n}

languages.text: "Dördüncü... Beşinci dereceden ihlal kaydediliyor... Ticari Ruhsatname, koordinatlarında ciddi bir hatayla geri döndü." {n}Pasqal'ın sesinde bir onaylamaz bir ton olsa da bunun, Ruhsatname'nin başına gelenlerden mi yoksa ışınlanma için yapılan hatalı hesaplamalardan mı kaynaklandığı belirsiz.{/n}
